subcodes.title: Words to the Master's entourage, spoken on 1912-08-03
subcodes.first_line: The explanations must be adapted to the capacity of the hearers and suited to the exigency of the time.
subcodes.first_line_orig: بیان باید بمشرب حضار و اقتضای وقت باشد حسن عبارات و اعتدال در ادای معانی و کلام است
subcodes.subjects: @Baha'u'llah in Sulaymaniyyih, @methods of teaching the Cause, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
